bugs_found.description: atob() call without try-catch - can throw on invalid base64
bugs_found.code_snippet: var salt = Uint8Array.from(atob(bundle.salt), function(c) { return c.charCodeAt(0); });
bugs_found.fix_suggestion: Wrap atob() in try-catch block to handle invalid base64 input
